<!-- Generated by StoryRail. Safe to regenerate. -->
# StoryRail Constitution

1. Story is the only entry point.
2. No implementation without spec, technical design, test plan, and tasks.
3. No PR-ready state without CI.
4. No E2E without preview.
5. No acceptance without E2E pass.
6. No release without rollback notes.
7. High-risk changes require human approval.
